commits.subject: Migrate MR0555258 (D'Souza, Compactifying the Picard scheme) to mathlib v4.31.0: bump the toolchain+mathlib pin (was v4.30.0, tripping the ledger guard on every commit) and repair the 4 v4.31 proof breaks in the base-change scaffolding — coyonedaCompFF naturality (ext+preimage), the tensorAssocNatIso 1/3 associator-naturality convert descent, and restrictionRingSheafHom via appIso_inv_naturality; first green build of the project (8560 jobs)
